DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-23-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Frederick "Rick" Galten, CSR No. 13202, Bus. Tel: 415-591-3333. (D501)

Appearances:
Attorney Armine Singh (via Court Call), Esq. of ALG & Associates APC, (888-550-9006), counsel for plaintiff/opposing party
Attorney Robert A. Bailey, Esq. of Anglin Flewelling Rassmussen et al, LLP (626-535-1900), counsel for defendant/moving party

Court hears arguments from both sides. Court notes for the record that "Gerber", coming out of Arizona, gives very little authority whereas "Metzger", coming out of California gives detailed analysis. Court rules now as follows:

DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is taken under submission as of this date.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
